rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS GREGORY HILL JR
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Distribute Funds Held In Escrow
rulings.Rulings: The motion to distribute funds is denied. The motion must proceed by petition, and appropriate notice must be given under Probate Code Section 1220. The Bookers' motion is not a proper petition with the required notice; thus, it must be denied. Should the Bookers wish to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact opposing counsel and the court no later than 4:00 p.m. today (9/16/2014).
